validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: cd apps/web && npx vitest run src/components/home

kpi_results.actual: Skeleton loaders + lazy queries + auth-gated fetching for fast perceived load
useActivityFeed() hook wired with 3 tRPC WS subscriptions (leadScored, taskAssigned, systemEvent) + 60s fallback poll + cursor-based pagination
InsightsSection renders 4 types (warning, opportunity, reminder, achievement) with icons, priorities, action links
All 5 section components implemented with loading skeletons, empty states, error handling

definition_of_done_items.evidence: Skeleton loaders for all sections, conditional query enabling, cursor pagination, useMemo for filter computation
AI Insights section with 4 insight types (warning/opportunity/reminder/achievement), loading/empty states
Activity Feed wired to IFC-069 useActivityFeed hook with 3 WebSocket subscriptions, type filtering (8 types), cursor pagination
Today's Focus section with SVG progress ring, target/actual/remaining display
Pinned Navigation with EditPinnedNavigationSheet, group management, pin/unpin mutations
Quick Actions grid with 8 configurable actions, EditQuickActionsSheet, localStorage persistence
115 tests pass across 4 test files (56 AuthenticatedHomePage + 4 HomePageContent + 28 PinnedItemsSheet + 27 PinnedItemsSheet2)

invariants_acknowledged: IFC-069 unified activity feed is fully built and wired — NOT deferred
Brand colors use #137fec primary, #f6f7f8 bg-light, #101922 bg-dark per DESIGN_SYSTEM_LLM_INDEX.md
All data fetches are auth-gated via queryEnabled = isAuthenticated && !authLoading
Material Symbols Outlined used for all icons per design system standard
Multi-tenancy enforced via tenantId in all backend queries

notes: PG-129 Authenticated Home Page — re-validated 2026-02-10. Complete implementation with: Welcome Banner (dynamic greeting + stats), AI Daily Insights (4 types), Quick Actions (8 configurable with edit sheet), Unified Activity Feed (IFC-069 useActivityFeed hook with 3 WebSocket subscriptions, 8 type filters, cursor pagination), Today's Focus (SVG progress ring), Pinned Items (group filtering with edit sheet). 115 tests pass across 4 test files. All 6 CSV artifacts exist. TypeScript, lint, tests, and build all pass.
